debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut : Type
inst✝¹ : (i : pSpec.ChallengeIdx) → SampleableType (pSpec.Challenge i)
σ : Type
init : ProbComp σ
impl : QueryImpl oSpec (StateT σ ProbComp)
inst✝ : Inhabited InnerStmtOut
outerLangIn : Set OuterStmtIn
outerLangOut : Set OuterStmtOut
innerLangIn : Set InnerStmtIn
innerLangOut : Set InnerStmtOut
rbrSoundnessError : pSpec.ChallengeIdx → NNReal
lens : Statement.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut
V : Verifier oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut pSpec
lensSound :
  Statement.Lens.IsSound outerLangIn outerLangOut innerLangIn innerLangOut
    (Verifier.compatStatement n pSpec ι oSpec OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut lens V) lens
stF : StateFunction init impl innerLangIn innerLangOut V
h :
  ∀ stmtIn ∉ innerLangIn,
    ∀ (WitIn WitOut : Type) (witIn : WitIn) (prover : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec)
      (a : Fin n) (b : pSpec.dir a = Direction.V_to_P),
      Pr[fun x => ¬stF.toFun a.castSucc stmtIn x.1 ∧ stF.toFun a.succ stmtIn (Transcript.concat x.2 x.1) | do
          let __do_lift ← init
          let a_1 ←
            ((simulateQ rbrSoundness_queryImpl).toFun (Transcript a.castSucc pSpec × prover.PrvState a.castSucc)
                    (Prover.runToRound a.castSucc stmtIn witIn prover)).run
                __do_lift
          (fun a_2 => (a_1.1.1, a_2.1)) <$>
              ((simulateQ rbrSoundness_queryImpl).toFun (pSpec.Type a) (liftM (pSpec.getChallenge ⟨a, b⟩))).run a_1.2] ≤
        ↑(rbrSoundnessError ⟨a, b⟩)
⊢ ∃ stateFunction,
    ∀ stmtIn ∉ outerLangIn,
      ∀ (WitIn WitOut : Type) (witIn : WitIn) (prover : Prover oSpec OuterStmtIn WitIn OuterStmtOut WitOut pSpec)
        (a : Fin n) (b : pSpec.dir a = Direction.V_to_P),
        Pr[fun x =>
            ¬stateFunction.toFun a.castSucc stmtIn x.1 ∧ stateFunction.toFun a.succ stmtIn (Transcript.concat x.2 x.1) |
            do
            let __do_lift ← init
            let a_1 ←
              ((simulateQ rbrSoundness_queryImpl).toFun (Transcript a.castSucc pSpec × prover.PrvState a.castSucc)
                      (Prover.runToRound a.castSucc stmtIn witIn prover)).run
                  __do_lift
            (fun a_2 => (a_1.1.1, a_2.1)) <$>
                ((simulateQ rbrSoundness_queryImpl).toFun (pSpec.Type a) (liftM (pSpec.getChallenge ⟨a, b⟩))).run
                  a_1.2] ≤
          ↑(rbrSoundnessError ⟨a, b⟩)

proof:
refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens (lensSound := lensSound), ?_⟩
  intro outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn outerP roundIdx hDir
  let innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec := {
    PrvState := outerP.PrvState
    input := fun _ => outerP.input (outerStmtIn, witIn)
    sendMessage := outerP.sendMessage
    receiveChallenge := outerP.receiveChallenge
    output := fun state => do
      let ⟨outerStmtOut, outerWitOut⟩ ← outerP.output state
      pure ⟨default, outerWitOut⟩
  }
  have h' := h (lens.proj outerStmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hOuterStmtIn)
    WitIn WitOut witIn innerP roundIdx hDir
  have hRun : ∀ i, innerP.runToRound i (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn = outerP.runToRound i outerStmtIn witIn := by
    intro i; induction i using Fin.induction with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ i ih => unfold Prover.runToRound Prover.processRound; simp [ih, innerP]
  exact hRun roundIdx.castSucc ▸ h'

refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens, fun stmtIn hStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn prover a b => ?_⟩
  let prover' : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec :=
    { PrvState := prover.PrvState,
      input := fun _ => prover.input (stmtIn, witIn),
      sendMessage := prover.sendMessage,
      receiveChallenge := prover.receiveChallenge,
      output := fun state => prover.output state >>= fun x => pure (default, x.2) }
  have : Prover.runToRound a.castSucc (lens.proj stmtIn) witIn prover' =
    Prover.runToRound a.castSucc stmtIn witIn prover := by
    induction a.castSucc using Fin.induction with
    | zero => simp [Prover.runToRound, prover']
    | succ i ih => simp [Prover.runToRound, Prover.processRound, ih, prover']
  rw [← this]
  exact h' (lens.proj stmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hStmtIn) WitIn WitOut witIn prover' a b

refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens, fun stmtIn hStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn prover a b => ?_⟩
  let innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec :=
    { prover with
      input := fun _ => prover.input (stmtIn, witIn),
      output := fun state => (fun ⟨_, witOut⟩ => (default, witOut)) <$> prover.output state }
  have h_run : innerP.runToRound a.castSucc (lens.proj stmtIn) witIn =
      prover.runToRound a.castSucc stmtIn witIn := by
    induction a.castSucc using Fin.induction with
    | zero => simp [Prover.runToRound, innerP]
    | succ i ih => simp [Prover.runToRound, ih, Prover.processRound, innerP]
  convert h (lens.proj stmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hStmtIn) WitIn WitOut witIn innerP a b using 1
  congr 1
  · ext x; simp [Verifier.StateFunction.liftContext]
  · simp [h_run]

refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens, fun outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn prover a b => ?_⟩
  let innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec :=
  { PrvState := prover.PrvState
    input := fun _ => prover.input (outerStmtIn, witIn)
    sendMessage := prover.sendMessage
    receiveChallenge := prover.receiveChallenge
    output := fun state => do
      let ⟨outerStmtOut, outerWitOut⟩ ← prover.output state
      return ⟨default, outerWitOut⟩ }
  have h_run : Prover.runToRound a.castSucc (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn innerP =
      Prover.runToRound a.castSucc outerStmtIn witIn prover := by
    induction a.castSucc using Fin.induction with
    | zero => simp [Prover.runToRound, innerP]
    | succ i ih => simp [Prover.runToRound, Prover.processRound, ih, innerP]
  rw [← h_run]
  exact h (lens.proj outerStmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hOuterStmtIn) WitIn WitOut witIn innerP a b

refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens (lensSound := lensSound), ?_⟩

  have innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec := {

    output := fun state => do

    WitIn WitOut witIn innerP roundIdx hDir
  have h_eq i : Prover.runToRound i outerStmtIn witIn outerP =
      Prover.runToRound i (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn innerP := by
    induction i using Fin.induction with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ i ih =>
      simp [Prover.runToRound, ih, Prover.processRound, innerP]
  convert h' using 2

refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens (lensSound := lensSound), ?_⟩
  intro outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn outerP roundIdx hDir

    WitIn WitOut witIn innerP roundIdx hDir
  rw [(_ : outerP.runToRound roundIdx.castSucc outerStmtIn witIn = innerP.runToRound roundIdx.castSucc (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn)]
  · exact h'
  · induction roundIdx.castSucc using Fin.induction with | zero => rfl | succ i ih => simp [Prover.runToRound, Prover.processRound, ih, innerP]

section Theorems

refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens (lensSound := lensSound), ?_⟩
  intro outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn outerP roundIdx hDir
  let innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec := {
    PrvState := outerP.PrvState
    input := fun _ => outerP.input (outerStmtIn, witIn)
    sendMessage := outerP.sendMessage
    receiveChallenge := outerP.receiveChallenge
    output := fun state => do
      let ⟨outerStmtOut, outerWitOut⟩ ← outerP.output state
      pure ⟨default, outerWitOut⟩
  }
  have h' := h (lens.proj outerStmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hOuterStmtIn)
    WitIn WitOut witIn innerP roundIdx hDir
  have h_run : Prover.runToRound roundIdx.castSucc (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn innerP =
    Prover.runToRound roundIdx.castSucc outerStmtIn witIn outerP := by
    induction roundIdx.castSucc using Fin.induction with
    | zero => unfold Prover.runToRound; simp [innerP]
    | succ i ih => unfold Prover.runToRound; simp [Prover.processRound, innerP, ih]
  convert h' using 1
  simp [h_run, StateFunction.liftContext]

refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens (lensSound := lensSound), ?_⟩
  intro outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn outerP roundIdx hDir
  let innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec := {
    PrvState := outerP.PrvState
    input := fun _ => outerP.input (outerStmtIn, witIn)
    sendMessage := outerP.sendMessage
    receiveChallenge := outerP.receiveChallenge
    output := fun state => do
      let ⟨_, outerWitOut⟩ ← outerP.output state
      pure ⟨default, outerWitOut⟩
  }
  have h_run : ∀ i, innerP.runToRound i (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn = outerP.runToRound i outerStmtIn witIn := by
    intro i; induction i using Fin.induction with
    | zero => simp [Prover.runToRound, innerP]
    | succ i ih => simp [Prover.runToRound, Prover.processRound, innerP, ih]
  specialize h (lens.proj outerStmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hOuterStmtIn) WitIn WitOut witIn innerP roundIdx hDir
  simp [Verifier.StateFunction.liftContext] at h ⊢
  rw [h_run] at h; exact h

successful_attempts:
refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens (lensSound := lensSound), ?_⟩
  intro outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn outerP roundIdx hDir
  let innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec := {
    PrvState := outerP.PrvState
    input := fun _ => outerP.input (outerStmtIn, witIn)
    sendMessage := outerP.sendMessage
    receiveChallenge := outerP.receiveChallenge
    output := fun state => do
      let ⟨outerStmtOut, outerWitOut⟩ ← outerP.output state
      pure ⟨default, outerWitOut⟩
  }
  have h' := h (lens.proj outerStmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hOuterStmtIn)
    WitIn WitOut witIn innerP roundIdx hDir
  have hRun : ∀ i, innerP.runToRound i (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn = outerP.runToRound i outerStmtIn witIn := by
    intro i; induction i using Fin.induction with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ i ih => unfold Prover.runToRound Prover.processRound; simp [ih, innerP]
  exact hRun roundIdx.castSucc ▸ h'
